creator: deischen@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

FreeBSD jumped over gdb4.17 to gdb-4.18.  I wanted to base 
the port on the GDB in our base system and was waiting for 
patches from the GNAT maintainers for gdb-4.18.  GNAT still 
provides patches for only gdb-4.17.  Either way, close this 
out until I get gdb-4.18 patches from the GNAT maintainers 
or merge their 4.17 patches into 4.18 myself.
